lesson.claim: Project Telos has an eleventh-wave grand-problem isolation package that selects Navier-Stokes existence and smoothness as the primary next grand target, captures 71 routed source rows across 13 lanes, records sidecar hard-problem/market wedges as unpromoted backlog, verifies six package-boundary claims in Crucible, preserves Forum/Index routing receipts, and maintains explicit boundaries against claiming a Navier-Stokes solution, theorem proof, new law of physics, physical validation, or accepted publication status.
lesson.scope: Local eleventh-wave documentation and receipt package only. This is not a proof of Navier-Stokes existence and smoothness, not theorem replay, not numerical validation of the continuous PDE theorem, not a new physical law, not clinical or hardware validation, and not an official accepted publication.
